<!-- GENERATED by _scripts/build_postprints.py — do not edit by hand -->

:::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.pp-card}
[![](/postprints/crackintrati/thumb.png){.pp-thumb}](/postprints/crackintrati/)

[Compliance of a crack embedded in a transformed transversely isotropic material](/postprints/crackintrati/){.pp-title}

[J.-F. Barthélémy, I. Sevostianov, A. Giraud, E. N. Vilchevskaya]{.pp-authors}

[Math. Mech. Solids · 2024]{.pp-badge}

::: {.pp-btns}
[{{< iconify mdi:web >}} HTML](/postprints/crackintrati/){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
[{{< iconify mdi:file-pdf-box >}} PDF](/postprints/crackintrati/crackintrati.pdf){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
[{{< ai doi >}} DOI](https://doi.org/10.1177/10812865221150771){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.pp-card}
[![](/postprints/crackineo/thumb.png){.pp-thumb}](/postprints/crackineo/)

[Micromechanical modeling of a cracked elliptically orthotropic medium](/postprints/crackineo/){.pp-title}

[J.-F. Barthélémy, I. Sevostianov, A. Giraud]{.pp-authors}

[Int. J. Eng. Sci. · 2021]{.pp-badge}

::: {.pp-btns}
[{{< iconify mdi:web >}} HTML](/postprints/crackineo/){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
[{{< iconify mdi:file-pdf-box >}} PDF](/postprints/crackineo/crackineo.pdf){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
[{{< ai doi >}} DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijengsci.2021.103454){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.pp-card}
[![](/postprints/nlayer_spheroid_conduction/thumb.png){.pp-thumb}](/postprints/nlayer_spheroid_conduction/)

[The Eshelby problem of the confocal N-layer spheroid with imperfect interfaces and the notion of equivalent particle in thermal conduction](/postprints/nlayer_spheroid_conduction/){.pp-title}

[J.-F. Barthélémy, F. Bignonnet]{.pp-authors}

[Int. J. Eng. Sci. · 2020]{.pp-badge}

::: {.pp-btns}
[{{< iconify mdi:web >}} HTML](/postprints/nlayer_spheroid_conduction/){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
[{{< iconify mdi:file-pdf-box >}} PDF](/postprints/nlayer_spheroid_conduction/nlayer_spheroid_conduction.pdf){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
[{{< ai doi >}} DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijengsci.2020.103274){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.pp-card}
[![](/postprints/transformhill/thumb.png){.pp-thumb}](/postprints/transformhill/)

[Simplified approach to the derivation of the relationship between Hill polarization tensors of transformed problems and applications](/postprints/transformhill/){.pp-title}

[J.-F. Barthélémy]{.pp-authors}

[Int. J. Eng. Sci. · 2020]{.pp-badge}

::: {.pp-btns}
[{{< iconify mdi:web >}} HTML](/postprints/transformhill/){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
[{{< iconify mdi:file-pdf-box >}} PDF](/postprints/transformhill/transformhill.pdf){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
[{{< ai doi >}} DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijengsci.2020.103326){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.pp-card}
[![](/postprints/viscousmaxwell/thumb.png){.pp-thumb}](/postprints/viscousmaxwell/)

[Effective properties of ageing linear viscoelastic media with spheroidal inhomogeneities](/postprints/viscousmaxwell/){.pp-title}

[J.-F. Barthélémy, A. Giraud, J. Sanahuja, I. Sevostianov]{.pp-authors}

[Int. J. Eng. Sci. · 2019]{.pp-badge}

::: {.pp-btns}
[{{< iconify mdi:web >}} HTML](/postprints/viscousmaxwell/){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
[{{< iconify mdi:file-pdf-box >}} PDF](/postprints/viscousmaxwell/viscousmaxwell.pdf){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
[{{< ai doi >}} DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijengsci.2019.05.015){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.pp-card}
[![](/postprints/viscouseshelby/thumb.png){.pp-thumb}](/postprints/viscouseshelby/)

[The Eshelby inclusion problem in ageing linear viscoelasticity](/postprints/viscouseshelby/){.pp-title}

[J.-F. Barthélémy, A. Giraud, F. Lavergne, J. Sanahuja]{.pp-authors}

[Int. J. Solids Struct. · 2016]{.pp-badge}

::: {.pp-btns}
[{{< iconify mdi:web >}} HTML](/postprints/viscouseshelby/){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
[{{< iconify mdi:file-pdf-box >}} PDF](/postprints/viscouseshelby/viscouseshelby.pdf){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
[{{< ai doi >}} DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijsolstr.2016.06.035){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.pp-card}
[![](/postprints/fracdensity/thumb.png){.pp-thumb}](/postprints/fracdensity/)

[Estimates of fracture density and uncertainties from well data](/postprints/fracdensity/){.pp-title}

[J.-F. Barthélémy, M. L. E. Guiton, J.-M. Daniel]{.pp-authors}

[Int. J. Rock Mech. Min. Sci. · 2009]{.pp-badge}

::: {.pp-btns}
[{{< iconify mdi:web >}} HTML](/postprints/fracdensity/){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
[{{< iconify mdi:file-pdf-box >}} PDF](/postprints/fracdensity/fracdensity.pdf){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
[{{< ai doi >}} DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijrmms.2008.08.003){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.pp-card}
[![](/postprints/hillforcracks/thumb.png){.pp-thumb}](/postprints/hillforcracks/)

[Compliance and Hill polarization tensor of a crack in an anisotropic matrix](/postprints/hillforcracks/){.pp-title}

[J.-F. Barthélémy]{.pp-authors}

[Int. J. Solids Struct. · 2009]{.pp-badge}

::: {.pp-btns}
[{{< iconify mdi:web >}} HTML](/postprints/hillforcracks/){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
[{{< iconify mdi:file-pdf-box >}} PDF](/postprints/hillforcracks/hillforcracks.pdf){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
[{{< ai doi >}} DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijsolstr.2009.08.003){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.pp-card}
[![](/postprints/permfractures/thumb.png){.pp-thumb}](/postprints/permfractures/)

[Effective permeability of media with a dense network of long and micro fractures](/postprints/permfractures/){.pp-title}

[J.-F. Barthélémy]{.pp-authors}

[Transport in Porous Media · 2008]{.pp-badge}

::: {.pp-btns}
[{{< iconify mdi:web >}} HTML](/postprints/permfractures/){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
[{{< iconify mdi:file-pdf-box >}} PDF](/postprints/permfractures/permfractures.pdf){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
[{{< ai doi >}} DOI](https://doi.org/10.1007/s11242-008-9241-9){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-outline}
:::
:::
:::

::::
